content:
- Check BLS CES data for employment trends: Unemployment is expected to be 5.10% (Q1 2026 avg) vs. 4.05% (2024), with payroll growth trends moving from +255k/month (2023 average) to +15k/month (March 2026).
- Examine sectoral stock indices: Compare XLK (+132%) vs. XLP (+22%) from Jan 2023-Jun 2026 to highlight sector divergence due to AI adoption.
- Analyze AHE data: Investigate any growing gap (.53/hr) between average hourly earnings in all-private sectors versus manufacturing.
